name: audio-visualizer
title: AudioVisualizer
description: Renders animated bars (frequency-domain) or a waveform (time-domain) for an audio file. Does **not** play audio — pair with a parallel `AudioClip` for playback. Uses `useAudioData` from `@remotion/media-utils` (cached per `src`).
pickWhen: the audio needs to be visible on screen — podcast clip, music drop, voiceover hero shot. Always pair with `audio-clip` for actual playback.
